/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/directory_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/utils/GeneratorTools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/utils/FilesystemInputTools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/utils/ClipboardTools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/error_messages.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/utils/UserInputTools.cpp.o -o bin/forge
